// EmpyreanAlteration: Reading order: every // key is documentation; the following keys are real settings in the same order. Many tuning dictionaries live in C# defaults until you add them here; this file ships growth mutator knobs plus quest item leveling (moved from Overtinked). Shipped defaults turn the mod on and allow all equippable gear to level; refine per-slot outcomes via QuestGrowthSalvageRules, SpellGrowth, and growth augments as you iterate.
// Enabled: Master toggle for EmpyreanAlteration (default true). When false, mutators and quest item leveling Harmony do not run.
// Verbose: When true, extra logging for mutator and alteration diagnostics.
// ItemLevelUpGrowthEnabled: When true, applies GrowthAugments / GrowthFixedLevelAugments / AugmentGroups when items with GrowthItem level up.
// ChaosTriggeredGrowth: When true (default), replaces random Augment growth with intelligent chaos-tinker-triggered leveling. Items spawn with ItemTotalXp=0; chaos failure triggers direct level-up with free tinkers/imbues.
// AttuneLeveledItemsWhenReachingLevelOn: DEPRECATED: Attune-on-level system has been removed. Kept for JSON backward compatibility.
// QuestRewardInitialBonusLevelsEnabled: Quest-growth gear: after XP init, roll K phantom growth tiers (no XP); optional ItemMaxLevel +K so the earnable track stays full.
// QuestRewardInitialBonusExtendItemMaxL: When true (default), add K to ItemMaxLevel after K phantom tiers.
// QuestRewardInitialBonusLevelsHardCap: Max K phantom tiers (clamped by ItemMaxLevel).
// QuestRewardInitialBonusLevelsMin: If weights empty: uniform min inclusive K.
// QuestRewardInitialBonusLevelsMax: If weights empty: uniform max inclusive K.
// QuestRewardInitialBonusLevelWeights: Five relative weights for K=1..5; empty uses Min/Max uniform.
// EnableLootItemLeveling: LootGrowthItem mutator: when true, loot-generated equippables (see LootItemLevelingEligibleWeenieTypes) get Item XP and show the client XP bar. Quest-given gear uses EnableQuestItemLeveling instead.
// LootGrowthReplaceVanillaCapWithoutIte: When true (default), LootGrowthItem strips ACE cap-only item level (e.g. cloak MutateCloak ItemMaxLevel with no item XP curve) so loot item XP can apply. false keeps retail cloak caps.
// GrowthAugments: Maps WeenieType (string keys: MeleeWeapon, Caster, MissileLauncher) to AugmentGroup name applied on growth level-up.
// GrowthFixedLevelAugments: Per WeenieType, maps item level (string key) to Augment enum name granted at that level.
// LootItemMaxLevelMin: Minimum rolled max level for loot GrowthItem / LootGrowthItem.
// LootItemMaxLevelMax: Maximum rolled max level for loot growth items.
// LootItemMaxLevelRollPower: Exponent p in w=U^p for loot max-level rolls; p>1 favors lower caps.
// LootItemMaxLevelTierBias: On higher tiers, slightly relaxes low-cap bias from LootItemMaxLevelRollPower.
// LootItemMaxLevelSoftCap: Most loot caps roll min..min(max, softCap). Above soft cap uses LootItemMaxLevelEliteBandChance then LootItemMaxLevelEliteRollPower. 0 = one roll over full min..max.
// LootItemMaxLevelEliteBandChance: Chance (e.g. 1/3000) to roll the elite band (max level > soft cap).
// LootItemMaxLevelEliteRollPower: Skew within elite band: higher => lower max levels much more common than 200+.
// UseTreasureTierItemMaxLevelBand: When true (default), GrowthItem and LootGrowthItem roll ItemMaxLevel uniformly in [5*T, 10*T] for treasure tier T (see TreasureTierItemMaxLevelBandMinTier/MaxTier). Skips biased loot max-level curve for that roll.
// TreasureTierItemMaxLevelBandMinTier: Minimum tier used when clamping T for the 5x/10x band.
// TreasureTierItemMaxLevelBandMaxTier: Maximum tier used when clamping T for the 5x/10x band.
// LootLowTreasureTierMaxBandCutoff: When > 0, tiers T at or below this use LootLowTreasureTierItemMaxLevelMin/Max for the cap roll (default 10..20 for tiers 1-2). Set 0 to use [5*T,10*T] for every tier.
// LootLowTreasureTierItemMaxLevelMin: Inclusive min ItemMaxLevel for low treasure tiers when UseTreasureTierItemMaxLevelBand is true.
// LootLowTreasureTierItemMaxLevelMax: Inclusive max ItemMaxLevel for low treasure tiers when UseTreasureTierItemMaxLevelBand is true.
// EnableQuestItemLeveling: When true (default), patches quest inventory XP init, custom item XP curves, catch-up growth, and OnItemLevelUp growth while the mod is Enabled (Harmony category EmpyreanAlterationQuestItemGrowth). Slot-specific outcomes and weights are tuned via QuestGrowthSalvageRules, SpellGrowth, and growth engine settings as development continues.
// QuestItemInventoryInitRequiresQuestFi: false (default): init quest-style item XP for eligible gear on first add to player—stock ACE quest rewards usually have no Weenie Quest field, so true would skip them. true: only init when item.Quest is set (tighter; use for custom weenies). Loot should use LootGrowthItem; GrowthItem items skip this path.
// EnableQuestItemWorkmanship: When true (default), rolls workmanship on the same first-inventory pass as quest XP init (fake bool 40107).
// QuestItemXpBase: Base XP for quest items when ItemXpCurveMode is AceGeometric.
// QuestItemXpScale: Per-tier scale applied to QuestItemXpBase for quest init.
// QuestItemMaxLevelMin: Rolled cap minimum for quest-given items (inventory init).
// QuestItemMaxLevelMax: Rolled cap maximum for quest-given items.
// QuestItemMaxLevelRollPower: Exponent p in w=U^p for quest max-level rolls.
// UseFixedGlobalItemMaxLevel: When true, ItemMaxLevel uses GlobalItemMaxLevel when greater than 0 for quest rolls.
// GlobalItemMaxLevel: Fixed cap when UseFixedGlobalItemMaxLevel is true.
// GlobalItemXpPlayerScale: Legacy geometric: scales ItemBaseXp when ItemXpCurveMode is AceGeometric.
// QuestItemMaxLevelTier: Tier passed into quest max-level roll.
// ItemXpGeometricFirstLevelTotal: Geometric mode: total XP to reach item level 1 from 0.
// ItemXpGeometricMultiplierPerStep: Geometric mode: per-level multiplier on the first-level step.
// ItemMaxLevelsPerTreasureTier: Tier scaling step when UseTierScaledItemMaxLevel is true.
// ItemXpCurveMode: Geometric (default): mild per-step growth; server clamps max level to ulong-safe. AceGeometric: stock ACE doubling (client bar matches). CharacterTable: character XP table. Geometric/CharacterTable patch server only; item panel may disagree.
// ItemXpVirtualCharacterLevel: Character XP table anchor for CharacterTable mode.
// ItemXpCharacterCurveMultiplier: Multiplies character per-level deltas in CharacterTable mode.
// ItemXpDummyBaseXp: Dummy ItemBaseXp when CharacterTable or Geometric.
// QuestGrowthSalvageRules: Salvage-like tinker rules for quest item level-up growth (same shape as Overtinked SalvageRules; duplicate WCIDs for quest-reward pairs).
// QuestGrowthMaxImbueEffects: Cap on imbue effect bits for quest growth level-up imbue rolls.
// QuestGrowthCatchUpSummarizeMinLevels: When level jump is >= this, one combined player message; per-level Info logs are skipped during that catch-up.
// SpellGrowth: Spell and cantrip growth on quest-growth item level-up.
// WeaponQuestGrowth: Quest weapons: deterministic elemental rend first, 5% extra imbues, ordered spell ladder, equal stat rolls, minor outcome pool.
// EnableCloakLootUpgrade: When true, CloakLootUpgrade mutator runs first on cloak loot: clears wield/retail cap, Living awaken cap = min(cloakTier*5, ItemLevelingCap), ratings, cloak set re-roll, 1-5 armor cantrips.
// CloakLootRatingRollCountMin: Minimum distinct rating properties per cloak.
// CloakLootRatingRollCountMax: Maximum distinct rating properties per cloak.
// CloakLootRatingValueMin: Inclusive min value per rating roll.
// CloakLootRatingValueMax: Inclusive max value per rating roll (before tier scaling).
// CloakLootRatingScaleByTreasureTier: When true, add treasure tier to max rating value (capped).
// CloakLootAllowLegendaryCantrips: When false, cantrip tier capped at epic (3) to avoid vanilla legendary wield bumps.

QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// Wcids: Both normal and quest-reward WCIDs so behavior is consistent.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// EffectKind: Kind of effect: Damage, ArmorLevel, etc.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// MinValue: Random range low (inclusive). Ignored if FixedValue is set.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// FixedValue: If set, use this value instead of rolling.
QuestGrowthSalvageRules.// Enabled: When false, this salvage rule is skipped.

QuestGrowthUtility.// Enabled: When true, level-up may apply Value/Burden/ItemMaxMana when higher-priority growth fails.
QuestGrowthUtility.// ValueReductionWeight: Relative weight for Pine-like Value scaling toward 1 pyreal.
QuestGrowthUtility.// ValueMultiplier: Multiply Value when Value reduction wins (e.g. 0.75).
QuestGrowthUtility.// ItemMaxManaMin: Minimum delta when mana utility wins.
QuestGrowthUtility.// ItemMaxManaMax: Maximum delta when mana utility wins.
QuestGrowthUtility.// BurdenReductionMin: Minimum EncumbranceVal removed when burden utility wins.
QuestGrowthUtility.// BurdenReductionMax: Maximum EncumbranceVal removed when burden utility wins.

ArmorClothingGrowth.// SteelArmorLevelChance: Non-jewelry clothing: chance for +SteelArmorLevelDelta Armor Level (steel-like).
ArmorClothingGrowth.// SteelArmorLevelDelta: Armor Level added when steel roll succeeds.
ArmorClothingGrowth.// RandomArmorModChance: If steel did not succeed, chance for random ArmorModVs bump.
ArmorClothingGrowth.// RandomArmorModMin: Minimum hundredths (40 => +0.40 when applied as v/100 to mods).

ArmorJewelryRatingGrowth.// Enabled: When true, roll ACE ratings after spell growth on armor slots, jewelry, and shields.
ArmorJewelryRatingGrowth.// OutcomeChance: Chance to attempt one rating outcome before steel/protection or salvage.
ArmorJewelryRatingGrowth.// HealingBoostMin: Jewelry Healing Boost Rating roll minimum.
ArmorJewelryRatingGrowth.// HealingBoostMax: Jewelry Healing Boost Rating roll maximum.
ArmorJewelryRatingGrowth.// VitalityGearMaxHealthMin: Vitality (GearMaxHealth) roll minimum for eligible slots.
ArmorJewelryRatingGrowth.// VitalityGearMaxHealthMax: Vitality (GearMaxHealth) roll maximum for eligible slots.

SpellGrowth.// Enabled: Master toggle for spell/cantrip growth on item level-up.
SpellGrowth.// AutoPopulateFromDat: When true and explicit ID lists are empty, auto-populate pools from spell table.
SpellGrowth.// RestrictNameContainsToPlayerSpells: When true (default), spells added via NameContains filters are also checked against PlayerSpellTable. When false, NameContains adds all matching spells from DAT regardless of what spells the player knows.
SpellGrowth.// SpellOutcomeWeight: Relative weight when choosing a spell outcome.
SpellGrowth.// CantripOutcomeWeight: Relative weight when choosing a cantrip outcome.
SpellGrowth.// WeaponSpellIds: When non-empty, replaces auto weapon spell pools.
SpellGrowth.// ArmorOrJewelrySpellIds: Legacy explicit spell IDs when Jewelry/ArmorClothing lists are empty.
SpellGrowth.// GenericSpellIds: Explicit generic spell IDs when non-empty.
SpellGrowth.// WeaponSpellNameContains: Name fragments for auto-population of weapon spells.
SpellGrowth.// ArmorOrJewelrySpellNameContains: Legacy name fragments merged into shared armor/jewelry auto pool.
SpellGrowth.// JewelrySpellIds: Optional explicit spell IDs for jewelry/trinkets.
SpellGrowth.// JewelrySpellNameContains: Name fragments for jewelry column auto pool.
SpellGrowth.// ArmorClothingSpellIds: Optional explicit spell IDs for non-jewelry clothing/armor.
SpellGrowth.// ShieldSpellIds: Optional explicit spell IDs for shields.
SpellGrowth.// ShieldSpellNameContains: Name fragments for shield spell auto pool.

WeaponQuestGrowth.// Enabled: Use ladder + stat + minor paths for quest-growth weapons (melee/missile/caster).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// SecondaryImbueChance: Chance for a non-rend secondary imbue after rend is satisfied (or no rend applies).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// SpellUpgradeChance: When spell branch runs: chance to upgrade an existing ladder spell before add.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// SpellAddChance: When spell branch runs: chance to add next missing ladder spell if upgrade did not apply.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// LowMinorOutcomeChance: After stat branch fails: gate for minor pool (cantrip, +base dmg, +damage rating, +crit damage rating).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorCantripWeight: Relative weight for minor cantrip sub-roll inside a successful minor outcome.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorFlatDamageWeight: Relative weight for +1 base Damage inside minor outcome.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorCritDamageWeight: Relative weight for +1 Crit Damage Rating (minor).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MinorDamageRatingWeight: Relative weight for +1 Damage Rating (minor); default equals MinorCritDamageWeight.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// OakSpeedDelta: WeaponTime reduction for Oak-equivalent stat branch outcome.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// MeleeDamageVarianceTightenPercent: Melee stat branch: percent variance reduction per proc (same formula as Granite salvage DamageVariance).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// RareWeaponPropertyGrowthEnabled: When true, each level-up can rarely grant +1 Cleaving and/or +1 LumAugSurgeChanceRating (≤1% each, clamped).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// RareSurgeChancePerLevel: Chance per level to add surge only if LumAugSurgeChanceRating is still 0 (no roll if multistrike/surge already on weapon).
WeaponQuestGrowth.// RareCleavingMax: Cleaving stacks +1 per successful rare proc until this cap.
WeaponQuestGrowth.// RareSurgeMax: Unused for stacking; rare surge grants at most one step from 0. Kept for compatibility.

// LesserCoalescedManaWcid: WCID of Lesser Coalesced Mana — raises item cap by +5 (or awakens to +5).
// GreaterCoalescedManaWcid: WCID of Greater Coalesced Mana — raises item cap by +10 (or awakens to +10).
// AethericCoalescedManaWcid: WCID of Aetheric Coalesced Mana — raises item cap by +15 (or awakens to +15).
// ManualAwakenPrefix: Prefix applied to manually awakened item names (Coalesced Mana use-on-target). Default 'Awakened' distinguishes player-driven awakening from loot 'Living' prefix.
// EnableAwakenRandomSpells: When true and SpellSiphon is loaded, awakened items roll bonus spells from SpellSiphon's gem pool.
// AwakenRandomSpellCountMin: Minimum bonus spells on awaken (SpellSiphon pool).
// AwakenRandomSpellCountMax: Maximum bonus spells on awaken (SpellSiphon pool).
// AutoAwakenTier1Wcids: WCIDs that automatically awaken to default profile when entering a player's inventory. Academy starter weapons and Pathwarden starter armor.
// ArcaneLoreDifficulty: Arcane Lore skill check difficulty for awakening. Default 1 (cosmetic, always passes, clears cursor).
// DefaultXpProfileName: Name of the default PreAwakenXpProfile used for all awakened items (loot drops, manual awaken, auto-awaken).
// ItemXpCurveVersion: Global curve version. When an item's stored CurveVersion differs, the item's progress is auto-migrated to the new curve (same level, new XP).
// ItemLevelingKillPoints: Points awarded to every equipped awakened item when the player gets kill credit on a creature.
// ItemLevelingQuestCompletionPoints: Points awarded to every equipped awakened item when the player completes a quest that would grant QB (via Loremaster bridge).
// ItemLevelingBossKillMultiplier: Multiplier for points from boss creature kills (Creature.IsBoss). Applied on top of base kill points. 1 = no bonus.
// ItemLevelingCap: Absolute hard cap for awakened item max level.
// HideExaminedBondedIvoryableOnAwakened: When true, appraisal packets for awakened items show Bonded as Normal and Ivoryable as false so examine text matches tradable behavior (server logic unchanged).
// DisableAttunedGlobally: When true, ALL items are treated as not attuned (AttunedStatus.Normal). Allows trading/selling of any item including quest rewards and Coalesced Mana.
// Features: Which alteration feature groups are active (AlterationFeature enum values). FakeKillTask is required for item-leveling kill points.
